description_long: This is a compact, rectangular shoulder bag with a long, single strap designed for crossbody or over-the-shoulder wear. The main body of the bag is made from a light-colored, possibly recycled or upcycled material, featuring a subtle blue print or text on the front flap. The edges and strap are reinforced with black fabric, providing contrast and durability. A small rectangular patch with a logo is sewn onto the lower front of the flap, adding a touch of branding. The bag appears to have a flap closure, with no visible zippers or external pockets. Its minimalist design and lightweight construction make it suitable for carrying personal items in urban environments.
description: A compact, rectangular shoulder bag with a long black strap, light-colored body, and a small logo patch on the front flap. The bag features a minimalist design with subtle blue print and reinforced black edges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the light-colored flap with blue print, black trim, and a small rectangular logo patch at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the bag and the width of the black strap.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the plain back of the bag and the continuation of the black trim and strap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bag's slim profile and strap attachment.
attribute_brand_logo: A small rectangular patch with a logo is sewn onto the lower front of the flap, featuring a red and black design with some text.
attribute_strap_design: Single, long, black strap, moderately wide, adjustable, designed for crossbody or shoulder wear, with no visible padding or attachments.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment accessed via the front flap; no visible external or internal pockets.
attribute_decorative_elements: Subtle blue print or text on the front flap and a small logo patch; no other decorative elements.
